archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist Softness (Neumorphism / Glassmorphism)

layout_spacing.app_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-[100dvh] relative overflow-hidden bg-[#FDF9F9] shadow-2xl sm:rounded-3xl sm:border sm:border-gray-200

glass_header.style: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#F2EBEB] z-50 sticky top-0

bottom_nav.style: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-2xl shadow-[0_-8px_30px_rgba(242,167,184,0.08)] border-t border-white fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md

progress_ring.description: SVG stroke with linear gradient from pink to lavender. Used on the home dashboard to show cycle progress.

mood_pill.default: bg-white border border-[#F2EBEB] text-[#6A6063] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 flex flex-col items-center gap-2 shadow-sm transition-all
mood_pill.active: bg-[#FCD5CE]/30 border border-[#F2A7B8] text-[#2D2A2B] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 flex flex-col items-center gap-2 shadow-sm scale-105

icons_and_assets.style: weight='duotone' for active states, 'regular' for inactive

hero_background.description: Abstract composition featuring geometric glass-like structures with soft pink and peach hues. Use as a soft blurred background for the 'AI Health Insights' card or the top header area of the dashboard.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='calendar-day-14', data-testid='log-symptoms-button').
The app must feel like a premium mobile app. Use the layout_spacing.app_container classes (max-w-md mx-auto) to constrain the web app width so it looks like a mobile interface centered on desktop.
For the circular progress ring, build a custom SVG component using stroke-dasharray and stroke-dashoffset to dynamically show cycle progress. Add a subtle shadow.
Use Phosphor icons. For mood and symptoms, use expressive icons like Smiley, SmileySad, Drop, Bandage, Lightning, etc., in Duotone.
The Passcode screen should be a full-screen overlay with a frosted glass background if triggered over content, or a clean white background if it's the initial load.
Do NOT use HTML <input type='date'> for the calendar. Build a custom grid calendar using grid-cols-7 to allow custom highlighting of period and ovulation days.
The Settings toggle should use Shadcn Switch but styled with the primary pink color instead of default black/white.
Never use pure black or pure gray. Use the defined text_primary and text_secondary colors.
